examples: The GDSs understand that and are making moves in that direction.
Europe is a more complex market than America so the GDSs are even more important there.
The New Jersey-based tech giant is the first of the big three GDSs expected to IPO in 2010.
Some low-cost carriers, such as easyJet, which had at first refused to use GDSs have relented.
So far agents have mostly stuck with the GDSs: rebuilding their IT systems to make direct connections to airlines is expensive, and their contracts with GDSs may make it costly too.
